# {{PACKAGE_NAME}}

> Auto-generated by Stackpanel — do not edit manually.
> Regenerate with `write-files` or restart devshell.

Type-safe, validated environment variables for {{APP_COUNT}} app{{APP_COUNT_SUFFIX}}.

## Quick Start

```typescript
import { {{FIRST_APP_JS}} } from "{{PACKAGE_NAME}}";

// Parses + validates process.env on first call, returns cached result after
const env = {{FIRST_APP_JS}}.dev.getEnv();
```

For non-Node environments (Cloudflare Workers, Deno, etc.), pass a custom env object:

```typescript
const env = {{FIRST_APP_JS}}.dev.getEnv({
  DATABASE_URL: "postgres://...",
  PORT: "3000",
});
```

## Apps

{{APP_SECTIONS}}

## How It Works

Each app/environment combination exports a `getEnv()` singleton:

- **Lazy** — nothing is parsed until you call `getEnv()`
- **Validated** — uses [znv](https://github.com/lostfictions/znv) + [Zod](https://zod.dev) schemas
- **Singleton** — first call parses and caches, subsequent calls return the cached result
- **Portable** — pass any `Record<string, string | undefined>` as input

## Runtime Requirements

| Context | What you need |
|---------|---------------|
| **Deployed** (Cloudflare Workers, etc.) | Nothing — bindings are injected by the host |
| **Local dev** | Devshell handles it via vals/chamber/SOPS |
| **Docker** | `SOPS_AGE_KEY` (or AWS auth) + `APP_ENV` to select environment |
